# PANTHM AI Labs

> High-performance custom systems architecture, low-latency applications, and bespoke automated workflows replacing standard SaaS middleware.

## Core Services & Solutions
- **Bespoke Web Development**: Zero-latency React/Vite frontends, vanilla CSS layouts, sub-500ms Largest Contentful Paint (LCP).
- **Custom Native Apps**: SwiftUI/Kotlin and high-performance Flutter mobile integrations running at fluid 60fps.
- **AI SDR Calling Agencies**: Custom WebRTC-based outbound lead qualification and appointment setting under 500ms conversational lag.
- **AI Workflow Automation**: Event-driven background worker pipelines replacing Zapier/Make translation layers.
- **Enterprise ERP/CRM Systems**: Consolidated back-office platforms, custom billing cycles, and centralized database structures.

## Systems Architecture: The PANTHM Consolidation Architecture (PCA)
We eliminate third-party SaaS middleware dependencies, double-billing server licenses, and high API latencies by unifying user interfaces, worker queues, vector pipelines, and data compliance policies into a single consolidated codebase.

## Programmatic SEO Solution Matrix
We offer hyper-optimized solution paths across 20 distinct services and 30 industries.
Example access URLs for AI crawlers:
- `https://www.panthm.com/solutions/{service}/{industry}/{location}`
- Examples:
  - Custom Web Development for Real Estate: `https://www.panthm.com/solutions/web-development/real-estate/pune`
  - Custom AI Automation for Healthcare: `https://www.panthm.com/solutions/ai-automation/healthcare/global`
